framework.name: Web3-Powered Ex-Ante AI Governance
framework.description: A proactive governance system that regulates AI during development phase rather than after deployment, using decentralized Web3 mechanisms for real-time feedback and adjustment. Contrasts with traditional reactive ex-post regulation.
framework.raw_quote: an ex-ante governance approach, advocated within Web3 frameworks as presented in this paper, involves setting community coordinated regulatory measures and oversight mechanisms during the development phase of AI technologies
